title: vochysia elliptica var. elliptica
intro: Vochysia elliptica var. elliptica is a plant species commonly known as the 'Quina' or 'Bark of Quina', belonging to the family Vochysiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Vochysia elliptica var. elliptica include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and exhibiting potential anticancer properties. The plant is often prepared as an infusion or decoction for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential health benefits and herbal preparations.
